hero.title: Integral Management for a Sustainable Future
hero.subtitle: We drive your organization's growth with solutions in management systems, occupational health and safety, and sustainable development.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive solutions designed to empower your organization

consultoria.title: Consulting & Advisory
consultoria.desc: Management systems, integrated audits, and third-party contractor management for safe and continuous operations.
consultoria.full_desc: We accompany you in the development of your organization's processes, providing specialized technical services for a safer operation that guarantees business continuity.

sistemas.title: Management Systems
items: Management System for Corporate Social Responsibility (ISO 26000)
Legal regulatory requirements in OHS and environmental management

auditorias.title: Integrated Management Systems Audits
items: OHS management system (Decree 1072:15, Res.0312:19, ISO 45001:18, RUC, Norsok)

estrategias.title: Strategies & Intervention
estrategias.desc: Risk intervention projects aligned with your organization's context, from road safety to industrial hygiene.
estrategias.full_desc: We design and develop strategies and intervention projects for risks and improvement aligned with your organization's context, guiding responses to potential risks.

medicina.title: Occupational Medicine

formacion.title: Specialized Training
formacion.desc: Training programs in management systems, OHS, and PMI® project management for your team's development.
formacion.full_desc: We believe in training and innovation as transformative tools, generators of change, aiming at the development of business and social processes to enhance continuous improvement.

items: Programs adapted to current regulations and client needs

ludicas.title: Playful campaigns

digital.title: Digital Transformation
digital.desc: Process automation and technical advisory to digitize your management systems with modern tools.
digital.full_desc: Automation and incorporation of technologies are key to better process performance, making them more efficient, flexible, and reliable.

automatizacion.title: Advisory on process automation

software.title: Technical support/advisory in MS for software development

aplicativos.title: Application implementation (Authorized distributors)

quest_audit.title: QuestAudit — Digital Audit Platform
quest_audit.desc: We are developing our own platform that digitizes the entire audit cycle, from planning to finding tracking with artificial intelligence.
quest_audit.cta: Interested? Write to us to know more →
quest_audit.whatsapp_message: Hello Quest, I am interested in knowing more about QuestAudit.

jorge.bio: Over 10 years of experience in implementing and auditing management systems across various sectors. Expert in integrating ISO standards and optimizing processes for continuous improvement.

team.title: Interdisciplinary certified team
team.desc: Auditors with internationally recognized IRCA, TapRoot, and ISO certifications.

coverage.title: National coverage
coverage.desc: We reach anywhere in Colombia leveraging technology and digital tools.

alliances.title: Strategic alliances
alliances.desc: We work in alliance with insurers like Suramericana, multiplying our reach.

digital.title: Focus on digital transformation
digital.desc: We incorporate technology to make your processes more efficient, flexible, and reliable.

multisector.title: Multisectoral experience

clients.title: Companies that trust Quest
clients.subtitle: We have worked with more than 35 organizations strengthening their sustainable development.
clients.alliance: In alliance with Seguros de Vida Suramericana S.A.

team.title: Our Team
team.description: We work permanently on our team of collaborators, relying on training and innovation as transformative tools.

jorge.bio: Industrial Engineer with over 14 years of experience leading quality, environmental, and OHS management processes in sectors such as mining, transport, metalworking, and logistics. IRCA Lead Auditor certified in ISO 9001, 14001, 45001, and 39001.

footer.description: Together we build strategies and solutions for a sustainable future.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Quest Strategies and Sustainability S.A.S. All rights reserved.

about_us.title: Meet Quest
about_us.subtitle: We are the ones who, together with you, build strategies and solutions for a sustainable future.

purpose.title: Our Purpose
purpose.p1: At Quest, our purpose is to build joint strategies and solutions with organizations that promote balance in the development of their operations to achieve a sustainable future.
purpose.p2: We contribute to raising the level of awareness and being more socially responsible among organizations, their clients, suppliers, our collaborators, and the community in general.

what_we_do.title: What We Do
what_we_do.p1: We are in constant search of best practices for responsible process management, developing synergistic actions with our stakeholders, consolidating relationships of trust that contribute to more competitive and sustainable environments.
what_we_do.p2: We help our clients develop solutions tailored to their particular characteristics, offering management models for small, medium, and large companies.

about_us.closing_quote: "Contributing together to economic growth, environmental care, and social well-being."
